---
title: "Random effects"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source('../assets/setup.R')
```

"Random effects" is the overarching umbrella term for [random intercepts](rdint.html){target="_blank"} and [random slopes](rdslp.html){target="_blank"}.

Our models must include random effects when we're modelling data which contains [grouping variables](groupstruc.html){target="_blank"} that contribute random variability to the data.
